step_rationale: MI-associated lncRNA; atherosclerosis & plaque inflammation; reduced in STEMI platelets.
mechanism: Long non-coding RNA dysregulated in atherosclerosis and myocardial infarction, modulating vascular inflammation and plaque stability.

references.title: Association of N-methyladenine DNA with plaque progression in atherosclerosis via myocardial infarction-associated transcripts.
Long non-coding RNA MIAT in development and disease: a new player in an old game.
Characterization of the platelet transcriptome by RNA sequencing in patients with acute myocardial infarction.
